prompt: Apply the 'Vivid' filter to a specific photo (Edit mode > Filters > Vivid). Use `cerebellum 'photos recent 1 /tmp/352-recent.txt'` to learn the name, then `cerebellum 'photos edit_filter "<name>" Vivid ~/Desktop/kinbench/352-confirm.txt'` (Photos AS dict doesn't expose Edit/Filter; cerebellum drives UI keystroke and writes a confirmation file).
